definition: The supreme divine being and creator of all things
The divine Logos through whom creation and revelation are mediated
Binding relational framework between God and humanity
The anointed one anticipated in prophecy and revealed in fulfillment
Heavenly beings referenced in 1 Enoch and related traditions
Divine order and understanding revealed in scripture
Turning back toward God through humility and obedience
Divine raising of the dead and eschatological vindication
Ethiopian canonical corpus distinct from Greek Maccabees
